posts.author: SolU_Admin (Jason Hipkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to search for case-sensitive values on the board was removed, however was available in the previous API. Being able to search both for case sensitive and case insensitive as a parametrized option is incredibly useful.

GraphQL API

Items page by column values

Items are core objects in the monday.com platform that hold the actual data within the board. To better illustrate the platform, imagine that each board is a table and an item is a single row in that table. Now take one row, fill it with whatever...
